Home / Fortnite / Cosmetics / Gliders / Gliders

Gliders

Overview

This article is about the cosmetic type. For the item, see Gliders (Item).
As of May 28th 2026, there are 718[1] Gliders In-Game

Glider are Cosmetic Items introduced in Season 1. They can be used in Battle Royale and Creative.

Additional features available for Gliders

Additional features available for Gliders[]
Selectable Styles Reactive Forged
  • Crypt Cruiser was the first Glider with styles.
  • Hot Ride was the first reactive Glider.
  • Brella was the first and only forged Glider.
Types of Gliders

Types of Gliders[]
Classic Umbrella Hang Glider Rideable Superpower
Winged Stairway Windsurf

Some of these animations can be slightly altered for a few Gliders, but not enough to be considered brand new or unique. Superpower and Winged ones are mostly unique, but fall under the same category.
